description:
Static-link a small Rust (or C) shim into AOT binaries that does what main.rs does today for `fz run`:

  1. Build a Runtime around the compiled module
  2. Spawn the fz `main` fn as the first process
  3. Drive run_until_idle()
  4. Exit with the Process halt_value

Lives in the existing fz-runtime crate (or a new fz-aot-runtime). Exposed as a C-symbol entry point so the linker can pick it up.

## Acceptance

- The shim compiles standalone.
- Unit test in the runtime crate proves it can be linked and dispatched.
title: C startup shim: initialize Runtime, spawn fz main, run_until_idle
